hotel.name: Lopburi Inn Hotel
hotel.description: A long-established budget hotel at 28/9 Naraimaharat Road, 0.5 km from the city center. Basic rooms with air conditioning, TV, mini fridge, and WiFi. The price point makes it one of Lopburi's cheapest AC options, and the location is convenient for the Old Town ruins. Some rooms face the street and can be noisy — request a rear room. Mixed reviews on maintenance standards, but hard to beat for sheer value in the Old Town area.
highlights: Among the cheapest AC rooms in the Old Town
Rooms with TV, mini fridge and WiFi at budget price
Long-standing property with experienced local staff

similarHotels.name: Noom Guesthouse
similarHotels.description: The most popular backpacker guesthouse in Lopburi's Old Town, offering a range of room types from dormitories to private bungalows in a leafy compound. Friendly, knowledgeable staff who have been hosting travelers for years and can advise on everything from monkey safety to sunflower field timing. Onsite restaurant serving Thai and international food at budget prices. Walking distance to Prang Sam Yot, Phra Narai Palace, and all Old Town ruins.
highlights: Walking distance to all Old Town historical sites
Knowledgeable staff with excellent local knowledge
Variety of room types from dorms to private bungalows
Onsite restaurant with Thai and international dishes (50-120 THB)

similarHotels.name: Hop Inn Lopburi
similarHotels.description: Part of Thailand's reliable budget chain with consistent standards across the country. Clean, well-maintained rooms with air conditioning, hot shower, free WiFi, and free private parking. The no-frills approach keeps prices low while maintaining comfort. Located in the New Town with easy transport links to the Old Town. The Thai chain model means you know exactly what to expect — it's not exciting, but it's dependable at this price point.
highlights: Reliable Thai budget chain — consistent standards
Good value for solo or couple travelers
Easy songthaew connection to Old Town (10 THB)

similarHotels.name: Pannara Hotel
similarHotels.description: A well-reviewed budget hotel popular with both Thai and international travelers for its central location and good service. Simple but clean rooms with air conditioning and hot water. Excellent base for exploring the Old Town ruins on foot. Staff speak enough English to assist with transport and attraction questions. One of the best-value options in the central area.
highlights: Centrally located near Old Town ruins
Good service for a budget property
Popular with both Thai and international guests

aiContent.hookIntro: Booking Lopburi Inn Hotel without knowing some rooms face the noisy street can lead to sleepless nights from traffic sounds.
aiContent.intro: Lopburi Inn Hotel provides basic, no-frills accommodations with air conditioning, TV, mini fridge, and WiFi at one of the lowest prices in Lopburi's Old Town. It's ideal for extreme budget travelers and solo explorers prioritizing value and proximity to historical sites over comfort.
whyBook: Cheapest air-conditioned rooms in Old Town
0.5 km from city center for easy access
Basic amenities like TV and WiFi included
Experienced local staff at long-standing property
whyNotBook: Street-facing rooms noisy from traffic until late
Mixed reviews on room maintenance standards
Basic setup lacks modern comforts or extras
No on-site dining or pool facilities
Some areas may feel dated due to age
aiContent.skipIf: Skip if you require quiet surroundings or well-maintained modern facilities.
aiContent.detailedReview: Checking into Lopburi Inn Hotel feels straightforward and unpretentious, with experienced local staff handling the process efficiently at the front desk on Naraimaharat Road. The room vibe is simple and functional: expect compact spaces with air conditioning, a TV, mini fridge, and free WiFi, but nothing extravagant—think clean basics suited for short stays rather than lounging. The standout amenity is the unbeatable price for AC in this area, making it a steal for budget-conscious visitors. Food quality isn't a focus here, as there's no on-site restaurant; guests grab meals from nearby street vendors or local eateries. Service style is friendly and practical from the long-standing team, who know the area well and can point you to the Old Town ruins. Typical guests are solo backpackers and extreme budget travelers, often international explorers on tight schedules hitting Lopburi's historical sites without splurging on lodging. While the value shines through, maintenance can vary, so inspect your room upon arrival. Overall, it's a reliable crash pad for those valuing location and savings over polish, especially if you snag a rear room to dodge street noise.
aiContent.locationReality: Situated at 28/9 Naraimaharat Road in Lopburi's Old Town, the hotel is just 0.5 km from the city center, a 5-7 minute walk to key historical sites like the Old Town ruins and Prang Sam Yot temple. Within a 5-minute walk, you'll find local markets, street food stalls, and convenience stores, making it easy to explore on foot. For farther spots like the monkey temple at Phra Prang Sam Yot, it's still walkable in 10 minutes, but transport like a Grab ride (around 50-100 THB) is needed for outlying areas or the train station about 2 km away.
localSignals: 0.5 km walk to Lopburi city center and Old Town ruins
No nearest BTS/MRT; Lopburi train station 2 km away, Grab cost 80-120 THB
WiFi included in rooms, breakfast not mentioned
7-Eleven and restaurant strip within 5-minute walk in Old Town
aiContent.travellerNote: Guests often praise the exceptional value and prime location near historical sites but note occasional noise from street-facing rooms and variable maintenance levels.
bookingTips: Request a rear-facing room to avoid street noise
Check Agoda for cheapest rates in Thailand bookings
Prices may rise during Lopburi's monkey festival in November
Verify room maintenance status upon booking
Confirm WiFi reliability as it's basic but free

similarHotels.name: Noom Guesthouse (400-800 THB/night (~$11-22 USD)) — The most popular backpacker guesthouse in Lopburi's Old Town, offering a range of room types from dormitories to private bungalows in a leaf
similarHotels.howDifferent: Offers dorms and bungalows for more social backpackers, unlike the private basic rooms here.

similarHotels.name: Hop Inn Lopburi (600-900 THB/night (~$17-25 USD)) — Part of Thailand's reliable budget chain with consistent standards across the country. Clean, well-maintained rooms with air conditioning, h
similarHotels.howDifferent: Provides chain reliability and better maintenance than this independent's mixed standards.

similarHotels.name: Pannara Hotel (500-900 THB/night (~$14-25 USD)) — A well-reviewed budget hotel popular with both Thai and international travelers for its central location and good service. Simple but clean
similarHotels.howDifferent: Emphasizes good service and cleanliness appealing to mixed travelers, beyond this hotel's value focus.

faq.a: Street-facing rooms can be noisy from traffic; request a rear room for quieter stays.

faq.q: What amenities are in the rooms?
faq.a: Rooms include air conditioning, TV, mini fridge, and WiFi, keeping it basic and affordable.

faq.q: How close is it to Lopburi's attractions?
faq.a: It's 0.5 km from the city center, a short walk to Old Town ruins and historical sites.

faq.q: Is breakfast included at Lopburi Inn Hotel?
faq.a: Breakfast is not mentioned or included; nearby street food options are abundant and cheap.

faq.q: Who stays at Lopburi Inn Hotel?
faq.a: Primarily extreme budget and solo travelers seeking value near historical areas.
Maintenance standards receive mixed reviews, so inspect upon check-in for best experience.

aiContent.urgencyLine: Budget AC rooms at Lopburi Inn Hotel book out quickly during peak travel months—secure yours soon for Old Town access.
aiContent.methodology: We rated Lopburi Inn Hotel based on price, location, amenities, and guest feedback from available data. We weighted location highest because Lopburi's appeal lies in its historical sites, making proximity key for budget explorers. Prices and availability change—always verify before booking. Last updated: 2026-04.
aiContent.metaDescription: Lopburi Inn Hotel in Lopburi offers the cheapest AC rooms near Old Town ruins for budget travelers. Note potential noise in street-facing rooms and mixed maintenance. Book now for unbeatable value in this historic area. (148 characters)
